channel.title: Data Import on Lisa DeBruine
channel.description: Recent content in Data Import on Lisa DeBruine

item.title: Multi-Row Headers
item.description: A student on our help forum recently asked for help making a wide-format dataset long. When I tried to load the data, I realised the first three rows were all header rows. Here’s the code I wrote to deal with it. First, I’ll make a small CSV “file” below. In a typical case, you’d read the data in from a file. demo_csv <- "SUB1, SUB1, SUB1, SUB1, SUB2, SUB2, SUB2, SUB2 COND1, COND1, COND2, COND2, COND1, COND1, COND2, COND2 X, Y, X, Y, X, Y, X, Y 10, 15, 6, 2, 42, 4, 32, 5 4, 43, 7, 34, 56, 43, 2, 33 77, 12, 14, 75, 36, 85, 3, 2" If you try to read in this data, you’ll get an error message about the duplicate column names.
